content.title: Resolve OQ-003: Concurrent file access strategy
content.description: Open question: Should the library handle concurrent file access from multiple agents? Currently there is no file-level locking. Options: (1) Accept as known limitation (document it), (2) Add advisory file locking (flock), (3) Add atomic write patterns (write-to-temp + rename). For MVP, option 1 with documentation may suffice. Decide and close OQ-003.
